name: soloterm-agent-org-antigravity
description: Google Antigravity sibling of the Skylence agent org. Bundles the Solo MCP server (the board/PTY/timer substrate every role depends on) plus the five role skills (orchestrator, planner, solo-worker, replacer, org-audit), the capacity-check spawn gate, the build-slot compile serializer, the ghost-probe no-fusion PTY check, the capacity-probe macOS RAM gate, and portable agent guidance. The Antigravity-native enforcement hook is intentionally omitted until the run_command payload shape is confirmed (see README).
